summary: VPN connection drops after 5 minutes of idle time
resolution: Upgraded VPN client from 4.10 to 4.12; idle timeout was a known bug.
Regional SMS provider outage. Migrated user to authenticator-app 2FA.

summary: Outlook will not sync calendar after laptop reboot
resolution: Cleared local OST cache and re-authenticated. Sync resumed.

summary: Slow VPN throughput from home (under 1 Mbps)
resolution: Confirmed ISP-side congestion via traceroute. User switched to a wired connection; no further action.

summary: VPN: 'Connection timed out' immediately after 2FA prompt accepted
resolution: Corporate DNS returned a stale gateway IP after a DC migration. User flushed DNS and switched resolver to 8.8.8.8 - VPN connected on the next attempt. KB-003 updated.

summary: Cannot print to office printer from home over VPN
resolution: Re-mapped printer with the FQDN print01.example.com instead of the IP. Print queue accepted jobs.

summary: Suspicious email asking to re-confirm VPN credentials
resolution: Confirmed phishing. Escalated to SOC; sender domain blocked at the mail gateway. User credentials rotated as a precaution.

summary: New laptop setup: missing corporate certificates
resolution: Pushed cert bundle via Intune; validated Outlook and VPN enrolment.

summary: Excel crashes when opening shared workbook
resolution: Reinstalled Office and removed COM add-in 'AcmeReporting' which was incompatible with the latest update.
